Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTOPHER F. TUTTLE OF THE CHANLER GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-510-848-8880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Total Resources International Inc. is GRANTED. No Opposition was filed.
